title: poa flexuosa
intro: Poa flexuosa, also known as flexible meadow-grass or bent grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Poa flexuosa include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
